title.zh: 特朗普宣布黎巴嫩停火延长3周，伊朗拒绝在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判
title.en: Trump Announces Lebanon Ceasefire Extension, Iran Rejects Islamabad Talks

title.zh: 特朗普宣布彻底封锁霍尔木兹海峡，伊朗制定反击目标清单
title.en: Trump Claims Complete Hormuz Strait Blockade, Iran Releases Counter-Strike Target List

title.zh: 以色列逮捕间谍士兵，伊朗收取霍尔木兹通行费
特朗普下令射杀伊朗船只，伊朗发布扣押视频
title.en: Trump Orders Shoot-to-Kill for Iranian Vessels

title.zh: 以色列国防部长扬言将伊朗送回石器时代，黎巴嫩指控以色列战争罪
title.en: Israel Defense Minister Threatens to 'Return Iran to Stone Age

title.zh: 美伊僵局持续：霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级，多国寻求外交解决
title.en: US-Iran Stalemate Continues: Hormuz Strait Tensions Escalate as Countries Seek Diplomatic Solutions
